hero.description: Experience the vibrant street flavors of Kolkata. Savor authentic wok-tossed Chowmein, fragrant Fried Rice, sizzling hot Starters, and our legendary Sunday special Alukatta.

benefits.sectionSubtitle: We construct every meal with high-quality ingredients using traditional charcoal and wok techniques.

items.title: Tangra Wok Heritage
items.text: Our noodles and fried rice are wok-tossed at high temperatures to capture the perfect wok-hei flavor.

items.title: Crispy Starters
items.text: Succulent chicken lollipops and coated cauliflower griddled and fried to maximum crispiness.

items.title: Sunday Special
items.text: A limited-time Sunday treat: the legendary Alukatta, crafted from secret ancestral spices.

items.title: Pure Street Spices
items.text: Fresh ginger, garlic, green chillies, and custom roasted ground spices blended in-house daily.

featured.sectionSubtitle: Customer-voted crowd favorites that highlight the unique tastes of our fusion kitchen.

reviewsSection.sectionSubtitle: Honest feedback from local food critics and customers alike.

reviews.quote: The chicken Chowmein here is a revelation. Wok-tossed beautifully, Indo-Chinese spices are spot-on. Tastes exactly like the iconic street spots in Tangra, Kolkata!
reviews.author: Ananya Mukherjee

reviews.quote: The Crispy Chicken Lollipop is a masterpiece of spice blending. Perfectly crunchy and served piping hot. The Potato Tornado is incredibly crunchy and addicting!
reviews.author: Vikram Kapoor

reviews.quote: Don't leave without ordering the Sunday Special Alukatta. The mix of spicy, tangy tamarind, soft potatoes, and chickpea mash is genius. 10/10!
reviews.author: Suhail Sen

cta.title: Hungry for Heritage?
cta.text: Browse our full street menu, customize your spice levels, and order your fresh chowmein or crispy lollipop today.
